description: This Traditional Italian Lasagna with Ricotta is a favorite family recipe loaded with four kinds of cheese and a flavorful meat filling, topped with marinara or Italian meat sauce.
ingredients: [{"name": "tomato sauce", "unit": "quarts", "amount": "3"}, {"name": "mozzarella", "unit": "ounces", "amount": "16"}, {"name": "fresh Parmesan", "unit": "ounces", "amount": "8"}, {"name": "ricotta", "unit": "ounces", "amount": "16"}, {"name": "lasagna noodles", "unit": "ounces", "amount": "16"}, {"name": "olive oil", "unit": "tablespoons", "amount": "4"}, {"name": "salt", "unit": "teaspoon", "amount": "1/8"}, {"name": "pepper", "unit": "teaspoon", "amount": "1/8"}, {"name": "grated Romano cheese", "unit": "cup", "amount": "1/2"}, {"name": "lean ground beef", "unit": "pound", "amount": "3/4"}, {"name": "Italian-seasoned bread crumbs without cheese", "unit": "cup", "amount": "3/4"}, {"name": "eggs", "unit": "units", "amount": "2"}, {"name": "water", "unit": "cup", "amount": "1/3"}]
instructions: 1. Cook tomato sauce. Grate Parmesan, Romano, and mozzarella cheeses. Season ricotta with salt and pepper. 2. Boil lasagna noodles in salted water with olive oil for 4-6 minutes, drain and hang to dry. 3. Prepare meat mixture by combining ground beef, eggs, bread crumbs, Romano cheese, and water; brown in skillet and drain excess fat. 4. Preheat oven to 350°F. 5. Assemble lasagna in a 9x13 pan: layer sauce, noodles, ricotta, meat mixture, mozzarella, and Parmesan in three layers, alternating noodle direction. Top with noodles, Parmesan, and sauce. Cover with greased foil. 6. Bake for 1 hour and 10 minutes. Let rest 10 minutes before cutting. Serve with extra sauce and Parmesan. Store leftovers refrigerated or frozen.
notes: Sauce can be homemade marinara or Italian meat sauce. Can prep and assemble a day ahead and refrigerate before baking. Lasagna can be frozen before or after baking. Reheat in microwave or oven covered with foil.
tags: Italian, lasagna, pasta, main course, traditional, ricotta, cheese, meat
